text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry. You must be disappointed in me…
choice_data_list: Let's figure out why you lost.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry. You must be disappointed in me...
choice_data_list: Let's figure out why you lost.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... Y-yeah, I guess you're right...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... Y-yeah, I guess you're right...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll win next time... so please keep watching over
me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll win next time... so please keep watching over
me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The reason... Yeah, working hard isn't enough. I'll
just lose again.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll figure out why I lost and then put that to use
next time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I might be no good right now, but if I just get
depressed about it, I'll stay no good forever.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll think really hard about this race and figure out
why I lost. That way... I won't lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is strangely upbeat after reflecting
on the race she lost.
